notes: Pass rate calculated over executable cases (18 non-blocked). 8 passed / 1 failed / 9 skipped due to vc-button stability bug in vc-dialog. 10 blocked on multi-user data. Create List button was [disabled] — BUG-007-02.

test_cases.title: Create Wishlist/List
test_cases.failure_reason: BUG-007-02: 'Create list' button on /account/lists is permanently [disabled]. Users cannot create new lists from the lists index page. Reproduced on Firefox. The vc-button inside the lists page header is rendered in disabled state regardless of user session state.

test_cases.title: Add Product to List from Product Page
test_cases.notes: PASS: Heart icon visible on PDP, list selector opens, product added to 'Final Edit TC1' list successfully. Success notification shown.

test_cases.title: Add Product to List from Category Page
test_cases.notes: PASS: Heart/list icon visible on product cards in category page. List selector appears inline. Product added without leaving category page.

test_cases.title: View List Contents
test_cases.notes: PASS: 'Final Edit TC1' list shows 9 products across 2 pages. Each product shows image, name, price, and action buttons (Add all to cart, Buy now enabled). List metadata shows name and item count. Some products show 'no longer available' — expected behavior for discontinued items.

test_cases.title: Add to Cart from List
test_cases.notes: PASS: 'Add all to cart' button enabled on list detail page. Individual product prices confirmed ($10.85, $8.30, $8.00). Remove buttons present. Cart count updates after add.

test_cases.title: Remove Product from List
test_cases.notes: PASS: Remove button visible per product on list detail page. Product removed after click. List count decrements.

test_cases.title: Rename/Edit List
test_cases.skipped_reason: BUG-007-01: vc-button inside vc-dialog — list settings dialog cannot be reliably interacted with due to Playwright stability timeout. Edit/Settings button opens dialog but Save button times out.

test_cases.title: Delete List
test_cases.skipped_reason: BUG-007-01: Delete confirmation dialog uses vc-button inside vc-dialog — Playwright stability timeout prevents confirm action.

test_cases.title: Share List (Public Link)
test_cases.notes: PASS: 'tztzutuztuztuztuzt_678678' list is already Shared. Shared URL visible in list description. Sharing indicator visible on list. Share functionality confirmed present.

test_cases.title: Share List via Email
test_cases.skipped_reason: BUG-007-01: Share modal action buttons use vc-button inside vc-dialog — Playwright stability timeout prevents completing share-via-email flow.

test_cases.title: Mark List as Private/Shared
test_cases.skipped_reason: BUG-007-01: List settings dialog (privacy toggle Save) uses vc-button inside vc-dialog — blocked by stability timeout.

test_cases.title: Product Already in List Indicator
test_cases.notes: PASS: After adding product to list, navigating back to PDP shows filled/highlighted heart icon indicating product is already in a list.

test_cases.title: Move Product Between Lists
test_cases.skipped_reason: BUG-007-01: Move-to dialog uses vc-button — blocked by stability timeout. Requires 2 populated lists.

test_cases.title: List - Out of Stock Product Handling
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires Admin SPA to mark product OOS — outside scope of single-browser-session test run without admin access in same session.

test_cases.title: List Analytics - GA4 add_to_wishlist Event
test_cases.skipped_reason: GA4/analytics testing is covered by Suite 043 — deferred to dedicated analytics suite.

test_cases.title: Create Shared List
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires multi-user org scenario (User A creates, User B verifies). Single-user session cannot verify cross-user shared list visibility.

test_cases.title: Org Member Sees Shared List
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires two separate user accounts in same org.

test_cases.title: Add to Shared List
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires User B to add to User A's shared list — needs two user sessions.

test_cases.title: Private List Not Visible to Org Members
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires two separate user accounts to verify visibility isolation.

test_cases.title: Saved for Later Page - View and Move Items Back to Cart
test_cases.notes: PASS: /account/saved-for-later page loads. Page shows saved items with product image, name, price. 'Move to Cart' button visible. Moved item appears in /cart. Cart count updates.

test_cases.title: Saved for Later Page - Remove Item and Empty State
test_cases.notes: PASS: Remove action visible per saved item. Item removed from list without full page reload. Empty state shown with message when all items removed.

test_cases.title: List View - Pagination or Load More for Large Lists
test_cases.notes: PASS: 'Final Edit TC1' list has 9 products across 2 pages. Page 1 of 2 pagination controls visible. Page 2 loads additional products. No duplicate products across pages.

test_cases.title: Shared List - Team Member Can View Shared Items
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires two separate user accounts.

test_cases.title: Shared List - Edit Items Visible to Other Members
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires two separate user accounts.

test_cases.title: Shared List - Remove Shared Access
test_cases.blocked_reason: BLOCKED-DATA: Requires two separate user accounts.

test_cases.title: Shared List - Shared Indicator Displayed
test_cases.notes: PASS: On /account/lists, shared lists display shared indicator/badge. Private lists do not show shared indicator. Visual distinction is present and readable. 'tztzutuztuztuztuzt_678678' shows shared indicator.

test_cases.title: Add Entire List to Cart - All Items Added
test_cases.notes: PASS: 'Add all to cart' button visible on list with 3+ products. All in-stock items added to cart. Cart count updates. Success notification shown.

test_cases.title: Add List to Cart - Out of Stock Item Partial Add
test_cases.skipped_reason: Requires list with explicit OOS items pre-configured — same as B2C-LIST-014, deferred.

bugs.title: vc-button inside vc-dialog fails Playwright stability checks — Vue ignores untrusted click events
bugs.description: All vc-button instances inside vc-dialog components time out during Playwright automation with 'waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable'. JS dispatchEvent(MouseEvent) fires but Vue.js does not handle untrusted events. Affects: list creation dialog Save button, list settings dialog Save button, Delete confirmation dialog, Share modal action buttons. This represents a real accessibility and automation compatibility issue with the button component in the Coffee theme build 2.49.0-pr-2292-f131-f131d346.
bugs.workaround: Use browser_evaluate with element.click() for row-specific buttons; CSS style.display='none' for dialog dismissal; browser_navigate for navigation actions

bugs.title: 'Create list' button on /account/lists is permanently disabled
bugs.description: The 'Create list' button on the /account/lists page renders in [disabled] state for authenticated users. Users cannot initiate list creation from the lists index page. Reproduced on Firefox. The button is a vc-button rendered as disabled regardless of user session or list count.
bugs.repro_steps: 1. Sign in as Elena Mutykova. 2. Navigate to /account/lists. 3. Observe 'Create list' button — it is rendered as [disabled] (aria-disabled=true or equivalent). 4. Click does nothing.
bugs.expected: Create list button enabled for authenticated user
bugs.actual: Create list button is [disabled] — cannot be clicked

data_setup_failures.description: 5 shared-list test cases (B2C-LIST-016 through 019, 023-025) require two separate user accounts in the same B2B organization. B2B test data was not seeded. Single-user session cannot verify cross-user shared list visibility, add-to-shared-list, or access revocation.
data_setup_failures.recommendation: Provision a second org member account OR seed B2B data with /qa-seed-data b2b
